title: nie-wasm: browser HTML/JS chat UI
description:
## What
Create `wasm/web/index.html` — a browser chat client that loads the WASM module and calls its #[wasm_bindgen] API instead of the daemon HTTP API. Reuse the layout from `daemon/web/index.html`.

## Algorithm
1. Copy daemon/web/index.html to wasm/web/index.html (use cp -f)
2. Remove the entire token/daemon auth flow (lines related to getToken, apiFetch, daemon WS to /ws/events):
   - Remove the token modal HTML
   - Remove getToken(), setToken(), clearToken() JS functions
   - Remove showTokenModal(), hideTokenModal(), apiFetch() JS functions
   - Remove the daemon WebSocket connectWs() function
3. Add WASM module initialization at the top of the <script> block:
   - import init, { NieClient, generate_identity, load_identity, save_identity, pub_id_from_secret } from './pkg/nie_wasm.js'
   - Use type='module' on the script tag
   - Call await init() before any wasm functions
4. Add identity setup flow:
   - On page load: try load_identity() from IndexedDB
   - If null (first visit): call generate_identity() to get secret_b64; call save_identity(secret_b64); display pub_id in status bar
   - If found: call pub_id_from_secret(secret_b64) to get pub_id; display in status bar
5. Add relay connection UI:
   - Input field for relay URL (default: wss://localhost:3210/ws)
   - 'Connect' button that calls: client = new NieClient(); await client.connect(relayUrl, secret_b64)
   - Register event handler: client.on_event((event) => handleEvent(JSON.parse(event)))
6. Implement handleEvent(event) switch on event.type:
   - 'message_received': appendMessage(event.from, event.from_display, event.text, isMe)
   - 'user_joined': insert user into online list in sequence order; renderUsers()
   - 'user_left': remove from list; renderUsers()
   - 'directory_updated': replace online list; renderUsers()
   - 'connection_state_changed': update status indicator
7. Implement sendMessage():
   - Get text from input
   - Call await client.send_message(text)
   - Clear input
8. Add a simple wasm/web/serve.py or document serving instructions (Python http.server or caddy) in a comment at top of index.html

## Defensive programming
- Never log the secret_b64 to console in production; OK for debug during development
- Show user-friendly error if IndexedDB unavailable (private browsing)
- Show user-friendly error if WASM fails to load
- WASM module served from ./pkg/ (relative path); UI served from wasm/web/

## Agent team
Implementer: read daemon/web/index.html to understand DOM structure; write wasm/web/index.html.

## Tests
- Visual check: open wasm/web/index.html from a web server; page loads, identity appears in status bar
- Manual test: connect to running relay, identity loads, send a message
- cargo check and clippy unaffected (this is HTML/JS, not Rust)
acceptance_criteria: wasm/web/index.html exists; loads WASM module with type=module import; identity generated/loaded from IndexedDB; relay URL input + Connect button present; send message calls client.send_message(); on_event callback wired to DOM updates
close_reason: browser HTML/JS chat UI created at wasm/web/index.html; loads WASM via ES module; identity generated/stored in IndexedDB
